programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.desc: CBS Sports' experts and analysts preview today's top matchups.

programme.desc: Stick with HQ all weekend for in-game updates, postgame recaps and previews of upcoming matchups.

programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ keeps you completely up to speed with highlights, top stories and in-game updates.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras Hotch lucha por su vida debido a las complicaciones del apuñalamiento a manos de George Foyet, también conocido como "The Reaper", experimenta visiones de su difunta esposa, Haley, y su némesis, Foyet.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC investiga a las víctimas de posibles asesinatos rituales en Utah, las pistas los llevan a creer que el sujeto que buscan podría estar fascinado con los juicios de brujas de Salem.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de una serie de estrangulamientos en Boston, la UAC busca un sospechoso al que le guste guardar recuerdos de las víctimas, y el equipo se pregunta si un vínculo común con las víctimas podría llevarlos al culpable.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La confrontación final entre el equipo de NCIS y un escurridizo traficante de armas llega a una conclusión explosiva y mortal en el estreno de la temporada cinco de NCIS.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En la autopsia, Ducky realiza un sorprendente descubrimiento que conduce a la búsqueda de un niño perdido. Mientras tanto, Tony se esfuerza para hacer frente a sus sentimientos por Jeanne.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el teniente Mann se unen para una investigación conjunta que se complica para Gibbs cuando un testigo del caso resulta ser su exmujer.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando Ducky determina que uno de sus cuerpos de investigación ha sido víctima de un asesinato, el equipo del NCIS descubre una red de intrigas criminales.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Arreglos secretos
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan el asesinato de un profesor universitario involucrado en un programa de becas cuestionable. Mientras, Danny descubre que su padre ocultó que el fiscal del distrito lo investiga por ética y procedimientos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Batallas de custodia
programme.desc: Erin investiga el caso de un policía acusado de matar a un sospechoso detenido. Frank le aconseja ceñirse a los hechos para evitar un escándalo. Mientras, Jamie insta a Eddie a perdonarla.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Más allá de todo
programme.desc: Un detective del distrito de Danny es asesinado mientras trabajaba encubierto. Frank busca al asesino, pero descubre un gran secreto del fallecido. Mientras, Jamie y Eddie ayudan a Nicky a encontrar a un excompañero de clase.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Exilio
programme.desc: Cuando Danny es asignado a servicio modificado tras investigar un caso prohibido, se da cuenta de que tropezó con algo secreto. Al pasarle la pista a su padre, Frank se alarma.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC conoce a su nuevo jefe, Mateo Cruz, un antiguo conocido de JJ. Cruz se une al equipo mientras peinan las calles de Baltimore en busca de un sospechoso que deja a las víctimas incapaces de comunicarse.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras Hotch lucha por su vida debido a las complicaciones del apuñalamiento a manos de George Foyet, también conocido como "The Reaper", experimenta visiones de su difunta esposa, Haley, y su némesis, Foyet.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man leads officers on a frantic foot-chase, deputies assist two teens in tracking down a man who stole their bike, and a dispute between roommates takes a dark turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. In Florida a man is pulled over in a stolen vehicle and asserts the car belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes several units on a reckless journey on the wrong side of the highway. Officers sets up a reverse sting operation designed to capture a suspected drug dealer. Officers decide to pull over a driver who intentionally avoided a road block.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mother with an arrest warrant is apprehended after trying to evade police, a repeat traffic offender commits multiple offenses, and cops respond to a domestic abuse case.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's addiction forces his family to call the police for help, a driver abandons his car and tries to evade officers on foot, and a man tries to conceal his illegal stash.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When a driver fails to stop, a freeway pursuit ensues. Officers investigate a suspicious car parked in a commercial parking lot. Officers respond to a shoplifting call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A decoy vehicle is strategically abandoned in a public parking lot. An officer responds to a burglary in progress call at a local tire store. Officers respond to a domestic call at a nearby trailer park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist leads officers on a low-speed chase, a motorist who led police on a dangerous chase feigns ignorance, and a couple's date ends with a totaled car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A quiet passenger makes a run for it during a traffic stop, a stolen puppy is safely returned to its family, and a struggling woman hits a speed bump on her road to recovery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Security guards face wild threats from a suspect who states he has a 'burner' gun. A man is bit on the head and nearly faints. A passenger throws out a suspicious bag during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man leads Officers on a pursuit across county lines. An Officer assists in an undercover sting to capture drug dealers. An Officer finds a gun in a suspects car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man apologizes profusely after leading an officer on a foot chase, a passenger in a car chase tells conflicting tales, and police find a wanted man on a roof.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: There police arrest a bicycling drug dealer and his female client. Police respond to a call of an unhinged Rottweiler. Officers arrest an inebriated man after they spot him grabbing a female bystander.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police question the legitimacy of the name a driver gives them. Both husband and wife protect each other in a case of domestic violence. A 12-year friendship is jeopardized when a woman suspects her roommate of stealing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged lawbreaker can't seem to grasp the gravity of her situation, and officers question a colorful trio of suspects.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Following a brief pursuit, the desperate driver bails out of the vehicle and flees on foot. An officer responds to an assault call. When a dog owner returns home, she's informed of her dog's mayhem and given a verbal warning and citation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A foot pursuit ends in arrest after a suspected drug dealer attempts to discard his goods. Police are called to a warehouse after the security guard is held at gunpoint. Police assist a young girl after being struck by a car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young man receives a wake-up call when police catch him breaking the law, and officers play peacemakers after a board game sparks a family feud.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers subdue an erratic man on a public an armed dispute quickly spoils a birthday celebration and deputies help break up a volatile domestic situation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wrecks his friend's car while fleeing police, detectives arrest a man wanted for armed robbery and attempted murder, and officers spy a subject who eluded them earlier.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to curb a stolen vehicle, a parolee at large speeds away with a two-month-old in the car, and officers try to determine the details of a stabbing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a male suspect in a speeding truck and ultimately force the vehicle off the road, the suspect is taken into custody without injury. Officers respond to a domestic abuse call. Officers are called to a home where a dead body is found.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police are led on a lengthy chase, a man is pulled over in a new car he doesn't own, and a detained woman has choice words about her boyfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A handcuffed passenger surprises Officers by running from a traffic stop. A fleeing SUV runs out of gas shortly after a pursuit is terminated. A man claims guns were planted in his car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A resistant suspect thinks he sees monsters everywhere. Cops are forced to officiate a spousal wrestling match. Officers try to sort out where two motorists got their car and whose dope they possess.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A domestic call turns chaotic when a male suspect resists and his girlfriend interferes with his arrest. A truck with detachable red and blue lights is located during a call of a police impersonator.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The lone holdout on a jury is found dead in the jury room. The eleven jurors who were voting guilty and who hated the dead juror are the natural suspects.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman found murdered in her home. Her resemblance to Sara causes Grissom to take a personal interest in the case and forces him to examine the decisions he has made in his life.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara, and Nick respond to an electrocution at a casino. The casino is hosting Japanese antiquities. The electrocution is just a ruse to steal the central piece of the exhibit.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A robbery at a grocery store results in a shootout leaving five dead. The police officer at the scene believes Grissom has a grudge against him.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The whole team must investigate a crime where a husband and his porn star wife were murdered execution-style.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine and Sara deal with the death of what at first seems to be a transvestite.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A mutilated female body is discovered tied to the undercarriage of a bus carrying prisoners from a women's correctional facility after a severed arm flies out from beneath the vehicle and strikes a car.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A violent murder in a casino parking garage and another episode in the police interview room lead the CSIs to one shocking discovery after another.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick, Catherine, and Nick try to determine the cause of a house fire that kills a teenage girl. The fire is in the same neighborhood as a similar arson fire. Grissom and Sara investigate a man found dead with letter tiles in his stomach.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine, and Nick investigate the death of a runner during a competition. Meanwhile, Sara and Warrick investigate the death of a couple in a hotel room, initially thought to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A roller coaster runs off its track, leaving six people dead. The CSI team investigates whether this was an accident or foul play.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two young men are found murdered after scamming Sam Braun's casinos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A casino employee is beaten and raped on her way home from work, but she survives and identifies her attacker.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A feverish night in Las Vegas results in one dead male in an alien suit, one more dead male in a bathtub, one dead female with two suspicous men at the scene, and another dead male with a polaroid of yet another dead male.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Un atraco profesional a un banco provoca la muerte de un detective. Mientras investiga el caso, Grissom se enfrenta a su pérdida de audición y otro CSI recibe una revelación personal.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Dos parejas se encuentran en un bar y una de ellas es asesinada. Cuando una segunda pareja es asesinada de forma similar, el equipo sospecha que una pareja de asesinos en serie anda suelta.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Cuando los principales sospechosos del caso del asesino en serie de Grissom son asesinados, Grissom sospecha que se trata de un trabajo desde dentro.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y Warrick se ocupan del caso de una anciana encontrada momificada en su armario. Sara y Nick llegan a investigar un allanamiento de morada para encontrar a una adolescente violada.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Durante la última ola de calor de Las Vegas, con temperaturas de tres dígitos, Gil y Catherine investigan a un bebé encerrado en un coche.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo se introduce en el lado Furry de Las Vegas cuando un hombre es encontrado muerto a un lado de la carretera, vestido con un traje de mapache.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Una cabeza cortada es enviada al Dr. Robbins desde Jackpot, Nevada. Grissom va a Jackpot para encontrar el resto del cuerpo y obtiene muy poca cooperación de los lugareños.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: La comparecencia de Warrick en la vista preliminar de un caso de violación y asesinato sale terriblemente mal cuando la única prueba es desestimada por un tecnicismo.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El encaprichamiento de un sospechoso con Catherine hace que ésta se haga cargo de un caso de alto perfil.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El sheriff está sometido a presiones políticas para que descubra quién mató a un comisario aéreo con un coche bomba del que el sheriff fue testigo.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Un adolescente aparece asesinado en una obra en construcción. Grissom, Sara y Warrick siguen la pista de la sangre en un martillo.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El único miembro del jurado que se resistía a votar aparece muerto en la sala del jurado. Los once jurados que votaban culpable y que odiaban al jurado muerto son los sospechosos naturales.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Una mujer aparece asesinada en su casa. Su parecido con Sara hace que Grissom se interese personalmente por el caso y le obliga a examinar las decisiones que ha tomado en su vida.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara y Nick responden a una electrocución en un casino. El casino alberga antigüedades japonesas. La electrocución no es más que una treta para robar la pieza central de la exposición.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team are called to investigate when a prostitute is found stabbed to death and stuffed under a bed after the body was cleaned.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When it's revealed that a ring of underground labs are manufacturing deadly drugs, Horatio and Speedle investigate the situation.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and Speedle investigate when a burglar and rapist has been sexually assaulted and taped to his bedposts after being suffocated to death.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team are exposed to radiation while investigating a murder, which leads them to an environmental lawyer dying of radiation poisoning.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team are called to investigate the murder of an eastern European immigrant stabbed to death in a peep show booth.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and his team race to find new evidence for a murder trial already underway in order to avoid the conviction of a possibly innocent man.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: It was supposed to be a routine undercover trip to the incinerator to dispose of drug evidence, but the police officers are ambushed.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio's case of a murdered woman is compromised when the federal agents, who have their own agenda to follow, get involved.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An ex-con who Horatio sent to jail asks him to help find his missing son. He finds marijuana while searching the boy’s room.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Students from all over the country descend on Miami for a week of fun in the sun. The party comes to a halt when the CSIs are called in on two cases.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Speedle and Delko are enjoying a hot Miami nightspot, "Club Descent," when the DJ's pyrotechnics triggers a fire that engulfs the club.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs delve into the "tweaker" culture after a brutal murder and near-fatal explosion takes place at the home of a methamphetamine addict.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio is called to the Miami West Detention Center to investigate a murdered inmate, he ends up witnessing three inmates escape.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a young model is killed by a hit and run driver, Horatio investigates the car's owner, who claims he loaned it out to the guests at his party.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El club nocturno más sexy de South Beach en Miami se convierte en un hervidero de venganza cuando un asesinato cierra las puertas de un servicio de citas único.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Una niña de ocho años se convierte en el peón inocente de un juego feo y abusivo que termina en asesinato. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un reencuentro de la escuela secundaria se vuelve mortal cuando un compañero de clase se deja llevar por un resentimiento de 15 años, Horatio y Yelina descubren que Ray aún puede estar vivo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI trabaja contrarreloj para encontrar al supuesto cómplice en un caso de asesinato con hacha de hace años antes de que se ejecute al asesino convicto.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI corre contra el tiempo para localizar y desactivar una bomba radiactiva que estallará en medio del centro de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI se enfrentan a la infame y mortal pandilla Mala Noche de Miami después de que un funeral se convierte en el escenario de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un accidente de navegación familiar revela un siniestro complot de estafadores para robar diez millones de dólares en lingotes de oro. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el asesinato de una adolescente que estaba de fiesta en Miami de camino a las Bahamas con su clase de secundaria.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un joven enfrenta cadena perpetua, y posiblemente algo peor, a menos que Horatio pueda probar su inocencia contra adversidades insuperables.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo corren contra el tiempo para descubrir quién está tratando de incriminar a Horatio por el asesinato de una mujer con la que ha estado saliendo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando un fin de semana de esposas termina en asesinato, el equipo de CSI se enfrenta a tres mujeres cuyas citas separadas con la víctima las convierten en las principales sospechosas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo trabaja en conjunto con el jefe de CSI de Nueva York, Mac Taylor, para arrestar a un asesino en serie antes de que mate a la joven que acaba de tomar como rehén.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Ryan Wolfe es atacado y gravemente herido mientras investiga el asesinato de una angustiada futura ex-esposa, y no faltan sospechosos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben confiar en un videojuego para obtener su próxima pista sobre dónde atacará un grupo de jóvenes pistoleros.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs must delve into the high-pressure world of elite prep schools when a student is murdered while studying for the SAT’S.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Det. Lovato’s cover is inadvertently blown, the CSI's investigate the Latin street gang she infiltrated when undercover.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team investigates a 1920s-inspired speakeasy when one of its owners is murdered and $10,000 goes missing.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team is confronted with a puzzling mystery when two different victims are linked by the same unusual weapon.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a beloved off-duty NYPD officer perishes in a robbery, the CSIs use the art of interrogation to break down their suspects and get to the truth.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when a masked man is found at the bottom of a notorious skyscraper known for its history of mysterious deaths.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a young pizza maker is carjacked, the CSI New York team of investigators must determine what the perpetrators were really after.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the team partner with D.B. Russell to outsmart Christine’s kidnappers before they run out of time to save her life.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Detective Mac Taylor and the rest of the CSI New York team tackle three twisted tales of love gone wrong.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Community unrest over the police shooting of an unarmed man forces Mac and the CSI New York team to move quickly to solve the case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor discovers the body of a woman in Brooklyn Heights, when his investigation leads him to a serial killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and Danny Messer go underground, entering the world of the ‘Sandhogs,’ men who burrow beneath New York City.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Stella Bonasera and Danny Messer’s mission to find a brutal rapist is hindered, as the victim has no memory of the assault.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A practical joke spirals into a century spanning murder mystery when a skeleton placed on a tour bus turns out to be authentic.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Fantasmas del pasado (S9 Ep10)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York investiga un bar clandestino inspirado en la década de 1920 cuando asesinan a uno de sus dueños y desaparecen 10.000 dólares.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Control P (S9 Ep11)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se enfrenta a un misterio desconcertante cuando dos víctimas diferentes están vinculadas por la misma arma poco común.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Mentiras piadosas (S9 Ep12)
programme.desc: Cuando un querido oficial de policía de Nueva York fuera de servicio fallece en un robo, el equipo de CSI usa el arte del interrogatorio para doblegar a sus sospechosos y llegar a la verdad.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: El edificio 913 (S9 Ep13)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando encuentran a un hombre enmascarado al pie de un rascacielos de mala fama conocido por su historia de muertes misteriosas.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Oro blanco (S9 Ep14)
programme.desc: Cuando secuestran a un joven pizzero, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York debe determinar qué buscaban realmente los perpetradores.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Seth y Apep (S9 Ep15)
programme.desc: Mac y el equipo se asocian con D.B. Russell para aventajar a los secuestradores de Christine antes de que se les acabe el tiempo para salvarle la vida.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Mi sangriento Valentín (S9 Ep16)
programme.desc: En el Día de San Valentín, el detective Mac Taylor y el resto del equipo de CSI de Nueva York abordan tres retorcidas historias de amor que salieron mal.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: La vida es hoy (S9 Ep17)
programme.desc: El malestar de la comunidad debido a un policía que mató a un hombre desarmado obliga a Mac y al equipo de CSI de Nueva York a actuar rápidamente para resolver el caso.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: El detective Mac Taylor descubre el cuerpo de una mujer en Brooklyn Heights, cuando su investigación lo lleva a un asesino en serie.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: El detective Mac Taylor y Danny Messer van bajo tierra y entran al mundo de los hombres que excavan bajo la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: La misión de los detectives Stella Bonasera y Danny Messer de encontrar a un violador brutal se ve obstaculizada, ya que la víctima no recuerda el ataque.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: Una broma pesada se convierte en un misterio de un asesinato que abarca un siglo cuando un esqueleto colocado en un autobús turístico resulta ser auténtico.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI Investiga cuando el DJ más popular de Nueva York es encontrado muerto minutos antes de ser coronado campeón indiscutible de scratching.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español
programme.desc: El brutal apuñalamiento de una joven lleva a los detectives Mac Taylor y Stella Bonasera a Stuyvesant Town, el epicentro de la clase media de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: La fuerza de la verdad

programme.title: Testigo en Peligro

programme.title: Extraordinary Measures (Cbs Films)
programme.desc: La determinación empuja a un padre idealista a unir fuerzas con un investigador médico solitario para encontrar una cura antes de que sea demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Los últimos caballeros

programme.title: 13 horas: los soldados secretos de Bengasi

programme.title: Jack Ryan: código sombra

programme.title: La estafa maestra
programme.desc: Tras ser traicionados y abandonados a su suerte en Italia, Charlie Croker y su equipo planean un elaborado robo de oro contra su antiguo aliado.

programme.title: 13 horas: los soldados secretos de Bengasi

programme.title: Sonic: La película

programme.title: Bob Esponja, la película

programme.title: Ben-Hur (2016)
programme.desc: La novela épica de redención de Lew Wallace vuelve con esta conmovedora adaptación en la que un noble inculpado (Jack Huston) sobrevive a años de esclavitud para vengarse del amigo (Toby Kebbell) que lo traicionó. Coprotagonizada por Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Sonic: La película
programme.desc: El mundo necesitaba un héroe, y nos llegó un erizo. Dotado de una velocidad sobrehumana, Sonic corre para salvar el mundo y evitar que el malvado genio Dr. Robotnik domine el mundo.

programme.title: Dora y la ciudad perdida
programme.desc: Cuando sus padres desaparecen en busca de la Ciudad Perdida del Oro, Dora se lanza a una trepidante aventura para encontrarlos. Acompaña a Dora y a sus amigos mientras se adentran en la selva, se adelantan a los cazatesoros y desvelan el misterio.

programme.title: El cuartel secreto
programme.desc: Charlie Kincaid descubre un cuartel general secreto debajo de su casa que parece pertenecer a un super héroe. Lo comparte con sus amigos, y ellos empiezan a creer que su padre separado podría tener una doble vida secreta.

programme.title: Outcasts

programme.title: Te amo, brother

programme.title: Post Mortem (LAS)

programme.title: El Infierno
programme.desc: Benny es deportado de Estados Unidos a un México desgarrado por la guerra entre cárteles del narcotráfico. Se involucra en el negocio narco y asciende rápidamente, rodeado de dinero, mujeres, violencia y excesos.

programme.title: No manches Frida 2

programme.title: Instructions Not Included

programme.title: Ruta 666

programme.title: Jessabelle

programme.title: Terror al anochecer
programme.desc: En 1946, el pueblo de Texarkana sufrió una serie de experiencias traumáticas que todavía recuerda hoy, treinta años más tarde, entre marzo y mayo, cinco personas fueron asesinadas a manos de un loco enmascarado.

programme.title: Terror en Amityville
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1974, una familia de seis miembros fue víctima de un brutal asesinato. Un año después, una pareja joven e inocente, George y Kathy Lutz, y sus hijos se mudan a una casa en la que ocurrió un terrible incidente.

programme.title: Cazador de demonios
programme.desc: Un maldito pistolero (Wesley Snipes) cuyas víctimas regresan de entre los muertos, recluta a un joven guerrero para ayudar en la lucha contra una banda de zombies.

programme.title: Terror al anochecer

programme.title: Terror en Amityville
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1974, una familia de seis miembros fue víctima de un brutal asesinato. Un año después, una pareja joven e inocente, George y Kathy Lutz, y sus hijos se mudan a una casa en la que ocurrió un terrible incidente.

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies
programme.desc: When cattle-ranch foreman Gene Autry learns that the new ranch owner, Sandra Knight, plans to raise sheep on a scientific basis, he must convince her to sell them as they will ruin the land.

programme.title: Comes a Horseman
programme.desc: Set in the American West of the 1940s, a pair of little-guy ranchers join forces against the depredations of a ruthless land baron determined to expand his empire at whatever cost. Starring Jane Fonda, James Caan, and Jason Robards.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Alias Jesse James
programme.desc: In this hilarious western spoof, insurance broker Milford Farnsworth (Bob Hope) unwittingly sells a life insurance policy worth $100,000 to the infamous Jesse James. Now, he has to figure out how to keep the deadliest outlaw in history alive!

programme.title: Pardners
programme.desc: A rich momma's boy returns west with the son of his murdered father's partner to foil a gang trying to gain control of his family ranch. They accidentally clean up the town.

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!
programme.desc: James Garner stars in this rollicking western spoof that has him taking on the job of a frontier town sheriff who must fend off villains (led by Walter Brennen) from every direction...all without breaking a sweat or dirtying his shiny black boots!

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter
programme.desc: James Garner is back in the saddle again as hustler Latigo Smith whose latest con is passing off cowhand Jug (Jack Elam) as the dreaded gunman Swifty Morgan. But when the real Swifty shows up, the Wild West is going to get a whole lot wackier!

programme.title: Inherit The Wind
programme.desc: Spencer Tracy and Fredric March go toe-to-toe in this powerful recreation of a titanic courtroom battle in which an attorney faces off against a fundamentalist in a Tennessee town where a teacher has been brought to trial for teaching Darwinism.

programme.title: 12 Angry Men
programme.desc: Eleven jurors are convinced that the defendant is guilty of murder. The twelfth has no doubt of his innocence. How can this one man steer the others toward the same conclusion? Henry Fonda and Lee J. Cobb lead the all-star cast in this classic!

programme.title: West Side Story
programme.desc: Winner of ten Academy Awards including Best Picture, this electrifying musical sets the ageless tragedy of 'Romeo and Juliet' in the slums of 1950s New York and stars Natalie Wood, Richard Beymer, Russ Tamblyn, Rita Moreno, and George Chakiris.

programme.title: Topkapi
programme.desc: Peter Ustinov won an Oscar for Best Supporting Actor in this lighthearted thriller about five thieves (including Melina Mercouri, Maximilian Schell, and Robert Morley) who undertake an absolutely impossible grand theft in Istanbul.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1968)
programme.desc: Steve McQueen stars as a sophisticated but bored tycoon who pulls off a bank heist so stunning that even Boston's finest are baffled. Faye Dunaway is the sleek insurance investigator out to bring him in but who, ultimately, falls in love with him.

programme.title: To Catch a Thief
programme.desc: A famous cat burglar who has retired to the Riviera catches a thief imitating his old style.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix's grandfather, tossed out by his wife because of his insane jealousy, arrives at his grandson's apartment.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix invests his and Oscar's money in Mr. Wing's Japanese restaurant.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix turns psychic in the Psychic, Shymcic episode of The Odd Couple. Invoking his ESP Felix warns a skeptical Oscar not to attend a gala dinner at which he is to be named sportswriter of the year. But Oscar ignores the danger awaiting him.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob and Laura are unaware that their teenage babysitter has a crush on Laura.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob's friendship with Jerry is almost destroyed in a feud over a neighbor's crabgrass.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: When Rob is offered a job as a humor consultant at a magazine for man-about-town, he runs into trouble with Laura.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Sally is romanced by a secret admirer when the owner of a delicatessen delivers flowers with her sandwich.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob and Laura are on their way to visit the doctor when they are trapped in a stalled elevator with a man who attempts to rob them.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The 'Alan Brady' writers entertain at a prison and Rob gets locked up with the inmates.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob puts his job at risk when he convinces Alan Brady to host a cultural documentary program.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Laura takes two of Millie's prescription pills and suffers disastrous side effects.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob tries to get a raise for Buddy and Sally from Alan Brady's tight-fisted accountant.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob struggles to hide his flu symptoms at a family party rather than admit Laura was right to warn him about golfing in damp conditions.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate Bradley tangles with Selma Plout when Selma tries to lure pilot Steve Elliott into marriage with her daughter.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Hooterville is thrown into chaos when Uncle Joe tries to scare up some crop-dusting business for Steve Elliott.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The presence of a competitor for Kate's hand motivates storekeeper Sam Drucker to confess his longstanding secret passion for her.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Homer Bedloe tries to stop the Cannonball when he finds that the train's schedule has been altered for medical purposes.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Scrooge-like Homer Bedloe derails Kate's plan for Christmas Eve caroling and gift-distributing aboard the Hooterville Cannonball.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate Bradley's perennial foe, Selma Plout, schemes to cheat Kate's daughter, Billie Jo, out of a weekend in "Excitement City".

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The Cannonball service creaks to a halt when Uncle Joe becomes General Manager of the Hooterville railroad.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The Shady Rest Hotel is beset by dog problems when Uncle Joe tries to make a quick buck as a dog-sitter.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Jealousy permeates the Shady Rest Hotel when the Bradley girls invite each other's boyfriends to the Turnabout Dance.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe has made an arrangement with Sam, the valley's justice of the peace, to house Eustace Pockle at the hotel for $4 a day for a five day sentence or until the sheriff's return.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter wants his men to pass a promotion test.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer holds a wedding ring for a friend and it appears to be lost when they spend a night baking bread.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Sergeant Carter's date has a friend she doesn't want to leave alone so she tells the Sergeant that it's a double date or nothing. As a last resort the Sergeant invites Pyle.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer meets a family from N. Carolina who have encountered truck problems en route to Oregon so Gomer puts them up in a blasting range cabin untill he has time to fix their truck.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: When five terrorists whose plan to pass through a security checkpoint at a boating dock fails, they flee taking on several hostages including Inspector Steve Keller.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A troubled teen from a broken home is suspected of shooting a friend's stepfather.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix once again returns to his hometown in California's Central Valley, this time to assist Armenian attorney Leo Kolligan in defending Juan Esparza, a farmworker accused of murder.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix is approached one evening by a woman named Lisa Ralph, who says that she believes someone may be trying to kill her, possibly because she has a valuable manuscript that she inherited from her late father.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A woman hires Joe Mannix to find her missing brother, whom she says is an alcoholic living on skid row.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A teenage baseball team hires Mannix to find their missing coach, who is a parolee who been running, and hiding his identity, ever since he got out of prison.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix and Peggy go to a nightclub intending to listen to a young guitarist, where Peggy recognizes a fugitive criminal named Brastow.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: The murder in Hawaii of a famous Nazi-hunter and the discovery on his bullet-riddled body of a rare World War II German medal pulls Steve McGarrett and Five-O into the search for a Nazi war criminal.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Someone is waging a bloody vendetta against a band of innocuous birdwatchers. Although Steve McGarrett feels certain that slaughter will continue, he can't comprehend the "who" and "why" of the killer.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Paul Burke guest stars as attorney David Lawrence, a political candidate whose promising bid for the U.S. Senate is endangered by the murder of a man who tried to blackmail him.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: In a desperate move to locate three world-famous scientists who have vanished, Steve McGarrett sets himself up to be kidnapped by assuming the identity of a fourth eminent scientist.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett is assigned by the governor of Hawaii to break up a confidence racket that is bilking rich visiting widows of their fortunes. Determined to fight fire with fire, Danny Williams signs on for a cruise, using a fellow policewoman as bait.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A native's love of his unspoiled homeland, a mysterious woman with a camera, a man with a briefcase, and a millionaire industrialist are pieces of the strange puzzle confronting McGarrett in his probe into the death of an official.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba finds himself in trouble when he is in involved in an accidental shooting while on the job. The only witness is Virgil's Aunt Ruda, whose grudge against Virgil may work against exonerating Bubba. Can anyone convince her to do what is right?

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A mobster's gun moll fakes her way past hospital security guards, and Dr. Sloan almost becomes her next victim! Attractive and smart, no one suspected Amy Westin's true identity.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Tonight, of all nights, Murphy's Law is definitely operating at its worst! After finally finagling all the details to put together a money-raising telethon for the hospital, Dr. Sloan loses his cool when the host of the show is murdered - on the air!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A late night call for help sends Dr. Sloan racing to the rescue! Ninety-two-year-old millionaire Jonathan Nash fears for his life.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker breaks in a new partner while protecting Alex from an ex-sheriff turned prisoner who blames Alex for putting him in jail and seeks revenge.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker fears he may have to take down an old friend in town from Japan, knowing the man has ties to the Japanese mob.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker races to catch an ATM robber with a bounty hunter who's better known for bringing in his capture more dead than alive.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker's partner goes undercover and gets sent to prison. But the bus never makes it when a hurricane blows into Texas and Walker follows the escapees to a remote hotel where only the owners and a special friend still remain.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Trouble arises when Alex tries to save a friends daughter from a religious cult and is captured.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver comes to the aid of college student David Ryman, distraught over losing a Physics contest sponsored by David's father, a professor at MacGyver's alma mater.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Nikki unknowingly becomes the target of an international terrorist group, planning to detonate bombs across the city in exchange for the release of their recently imprisoned leader.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver battles an eccentric scientist whose bizarre biological experiments go out of control and threaten the environment.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: After an accident forces Pete Thornton to retire from the foundation, MacGyver suspects foul play within the organization and uncovers a plot to assassinate a visiting Third World Leader.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A supposed 'ticket to heaven' leads to a trail of greedy scam artists and gamblers! Dying of a gunshot wounds, a man gives Dr. Sloan a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A 'perfect cover' becomes a foul frame-up when Steve Sloan is accused of murder! Staging various crimes in their off-hours with perfect success, four corrupt police officers think they have it made - until one of them commits a homicide.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: New Girl at School
programme.desc: There is a new girl at school, and it is love at first sight for Bud Anderson.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Kathy Makes Magic
programme.desc: Kathy trades her skaters for a magician's box.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Advantage to Betty
programme.desc: Betty is excited her tennis team has made the championships.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: The Big Test
programme.desc: For once in his life, Bud has studied hard for a big test.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Mr. French takes a two-week vacation to the west with the others staying home. When Bill is called away to South America for work, the children end up flying out west to be with Mr. French. It makes his vacation more enjoyable.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Jody and Buffy accidentally pull off the arm of Mrs. Beasley and it is a traumatic event.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: When French and Bill both have to be out at the same time, Cissy agrees to babysit. Cissy gets a chance to go to a concert, so she has a friend take her place. She gets sick, so her mother watches the kids, who then calls her husband...

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: When Bill returns home from a business trip, he finds that Cissy's hairstyle is different, Buffy has a new tooth, and he does not know who Jody's best friend is. Bill decides to stop traveling for his work, and become a full-time dad.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Buffy wants more independence. Jody is allowed to go to some places on his own, but Buffy is not allowed the same privilege.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Jody wants to a club with the big boys, but they tell him he is too young. To prove he is old enough, they tell him he has to cut off some of Mr. French's whiskers and bring it to them.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: A teenager from a royal family in Vienna wants to marry Cissy, and she wants to marry him. She thinks she is a grown-up who can make her own decisions, but Uncle Bill knows she is just in love with love and in love with something different.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: A friend of Bill's confides that he is worried about his son growing up in a home with mostly females. That makes Bill wonder about Jody not having enough time with boys. Bill sends him off to camp. Jody pretends to like it.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude gets contrary and is ready to mow down 'The Duke' with a verbal barrage when he stops in Tuckahoe to publicize a movie. John Wayne, playing himself, plans to have lunch in the home of his number-one fan -- Dr. Arthur Harmon.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: With the weight of the women's lib movement resting squarely on her shoulders, Maude takes up her duties as manager over three men in a real estate office.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude is spending every spare minute with a handsome, best-selling author and Walter resents it. Walter thinks Barry Witherspoon is a pompous bore, regardless of his sexual preferences, but Maude defends him and accuses Walter of bigotry.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's mother pays a rare visit, transforming Maude into a quivering mass of guilt and insecurity. Wanting her mother to approve of Walter, whom she has never met, Maude over-reacts, putting the entire household into a state of hysteria.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude decides her marriage is over -- Walter has fallen off the wagon and was seen by her in a compromising situation. Then Walter comes home with hopes of patching things up only to find Maude herself in a compromising situation.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Henry Fonda makes a rare television guest appearance when Maude decides he is an ideal candidate for President of the United States and starts the campaign without him, in the first half of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude persists in spearheading a movement to draft Henry Fonda for President and has everyone around her convinced that she must be a manic-depressive in need of professional care.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's unfailing loyalty to her nephew Steve stretches very thin, and so does Walter's patience, when it becomes evident that his 'free and easy' lifestyle is just a cover-up for his basic lack of responsibility.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude refuses to accept the idea that a noted literary authority would choose to lunch with Vivian at the exclusion of herself. But, when she confronts the two of them, the reality of the situation becomes painfully clear.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude has nothing but good intentions when she hires an ex-convict, but panics after she finds out why he went to prison.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is unhappy with Edith doing volunteer work at The Sunshine home for seniors and he demands she quit.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie's company physical is fast approaching, and he needs to remain calm for an entire weekend for the blood pressure test. Of course, a variety of situations arise that test Archie's ability to keep an even temper.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria, now in her seventh month, is feeling unattractive. Added to that is the fact that Mike is tutoring an attractive young woman in Economics and suspects that something else might be going on.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie and Mike argue over the religious upbringing of baby Joey during a Thanksgiving Day dinner.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: A mugger tries to attack Archie in his cab ... but this time, Archie strikes back with some pepper spray. So why is Archie the one facing criminal charges?

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: New DNA technology and the national DNA databank help police hunt down a rapist-killer 11 years after he committed his crimes, and a detective's painstaking recreation of a woman's shooting death proves it wasn't an accident.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: A killer authors a book about his con-man past that becomes the key to solving a 29-year-old cold case of two high school sweethearts--and three other cold case murders--leading police to believe he could be the Zodiac Killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In July 1997, the brutal murder of 19-year-old Tiffany Johnston rocks the small town of Bethany, Oklahoma. DNA points to her killer over a decade later and leads investigators across state lines.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Guns found dumped in a pond help police to solve the 15-year-old murder of Detroit cab company owner. And the rape and murder of an Atlanta TV station receptionist goes cold for 20 years before DNA links a man to the crime.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In the heart of Cajun country, young mother Brenda DuPont is found murdered in her home in May 1988. The initial investigation sputters and turns cold, but her sister Linda vows to solve her murder.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: After 19 years, Kansas detectives reopen the case of a banker found beaten to death in his bed--and the chief suspect is his cheating wife. And a man with a guilty conscience helps Arkansas police to crack a cold case of murder.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Bill Kurtis examines one of the most infamous cold cases in Los Angeles history.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Looks at how law enforcers stick with cases for many years, using fresh evidence to win convictions or to free prisoners who were wrongfully jailed. We examine the unsolved murder of Hogan's Heroes star Bob Crane.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In June 1985, a 20-year-old "Sucker Day" Festival Queen is found brutalized. The small community of Nixa, Missouri, is certain her blood is on the hands of a local wealthy businessman, but after 25 years DNA reveals the true killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: In 1983, Navy seamen Sonny Grotton left base for a long weekend at home. But as he pulled into his driveway, a gunman killed him. And in 1993, former state trooper Doug Wright claimed his estranged wife shot and killed herself in their home.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When Sherry Leighty goes missing in 1999, her family is left wondering how a dedicated mother of three could vanish without a trace. A decade later, the cold case heats up when Sherry's sister launches a social media campaign.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: 13 days after Pam Pitts disappears in 1988 her charred body is found at a popular hangout spot in the Arizona desert. When a second victim is discovered in a mineshaft, detectives suspect the killer may have known them both.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: After the murder of her aunt goes cold, a woman helps launch an advocate group that brings awareness to cases that have gone unsolved.

programme.title: Crank Yankers
programme.desc: Terrence plans a gender reveal for DJ Khaled, Tim Heidecker and Eric Wareheim negotiate a "legally" fun time, and Heidi Gardner practices condescending philanthropy.

programme.title: Crank Yankers
programme.desc: Landalious creates his own karaoke opportunity, Abbi Jacobson tries to get into character, and Niles and Giles look to take their internet videos to the next level.

programme.title: Crank Yankers
programme.desc: Iliza Shlesinger seeks help passing her dental technician exam, Demetri Martin vents his career frustrations, and Dick Birchum plans a birthday for his conjoined twins.

programme.title: Crank Yankers
programme.desc: Terrence arranges a rafting trip for Ariana Grande, Punkie Johnson feels entitled to fine art royalties, and Ron Funches seeks a committed tag team partner.

programme.title: Nathan For You
programme.desc: Nathan devises a method of selling chili in secret and founds a charity to help a massage parlor upsell its clients.

programme.title: Nathan For You

programme.desc: Una fría noche de Diciembre de 1993, Rose Larner se detuvo en una tienda cuando se dirigía a la casa de su novio. Nunca más se la vio ni se supo de ella.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pedido fatal
programme.desc: Un hombre es encontrado muerto en su casa y su ex esposa tiene una coartada perfecta. Para determinar la hora de la muerte, los investigadores deben saber cuándo comió la víctima por última vez.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesinato brutal, muchos sospechosos y pruebas contradictorias, pero los forenses fueron claros en una cosa: el asesino conocía a su víctima. Y eso les dio a los investigadores una ventaja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Acechado en la noche
programme.desc: Cuando una víctima es brutalmente asesinada en su propia cama, los investigadores encuentran una huella de zapato en el barro de afuera, evidencia física que esperan que conduzca al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1990, el cuerpo de Shirley Andronowich fue encontrado mutilado. Los testigos le dijeron a la policía que tuvo una pelea con su esposo la noche anterior, pero la evidencia forense demostró que él no tuvo nada que ver con su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La pista ardiente
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie anda suelto en Washington, DC. Cada uno de los incendios se inició con el mismo tipo de dispositivo incendiario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Testigo presencial
programme.desc: Una adolescente desapareció después de una noche de paseos a caballo. Su cuerpo fue encontrado un mes después, a cinco kilómetros de su casa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, cuando Steven Fortin ataca a la Oficial de Policía Estatal de Maine fuera de su hora servicio, Vicky Gardner, durante una parada rutinaria, se desencadena una serie de eventos que reinician de golpe un caso de asesinato estancado en New Jersey.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray fue acusada de la muerte de su esposo. Su hijo estaba tan convencido de su inocencia que se matriculó en la facultad de derecho, estudió todas las pruebas y, finalmente, descubrió la verdad de lo que realmente sucedió entre sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El conductor dijo que no podía haber sido él quien atropelló a un peatón y se fugó en la calle Harrisburg. El Jeep Grand Cherokee que él estaba arrendando en ese entonces había sido vendido meses atrás a otro comprador en otro estado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1985, Julie Estes fue secuestrada de una tienda de conveniencia en Southside donde trabajaba. Su cuerpo fue encontrado al día siguiente, pero el asesinato quedó sin resolver hasta el 2003.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas reveladoras
programme.desc: La desaparición de la atleta universitaria de Filadelfia, Aimee Willard, es investigada después de que su carro fuera encontrado al costado de la carretera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un recuerdo conmovedor
programme.desc: Una niña inteligente de Visalia, California recuerda dejar huellas dactilares en el vehículo de su secuestrador cuando es secuestrada, lo que ayuda a la policía en su búsqueda junto con una huella de neumático en el barro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un pediatra, provocada por la misteriosa muerte de uno de sus pacientes, conduce a un hospital de Texas donde la tasa de mortalidad pediátrica es más alta que en cualquier hospital del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Judy Southern llegó a casa del trabajo y recibió un disparo de un hombre armado que esperaba dentro. Su esposo llegó poco después, llamó a los servicios de emergencia y la llevó al hospital.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Suela reveladora
programme.desc: Armada con solo eso, la policía esperaba que las huellas de zapatos encontradas en la escena del crimen de Michigan, volvieran a encarrilar su investigación sobre el asesinato de Audrey Nichols.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El Septiembre de 1984, en un suburbio de Tucson, Arizona, Vicki Hoskins, de ocho años, salió de su casa en su bicicleta rosada para enviar una carta a su madre. Ella nunca regresó, pero su bicicleta ligeramente dañada fue encontrada en las cercanías.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La escena del crimen era especialmente violenta: un esposo y una esposa fueron asesinados a tiros en su habitación. ¿Fue cómplice su hija de 16 años?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2005, el cuerpo de la joven madre, Summer Baldwin, fue encontrado en una maleta en un vertedero de Texas.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Personality is critical when representing the DCC brand. Kelli takes the women on location to see how they interact during a public appearance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Katy Perry's choreographer, Nick Florez, stops by to offer some performance advice to the ladies. A day that each cheerleader never forgets. The first time they wear the DCC uniform to pose for their cameo photos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad goes on an appearance to support pop music star, Demi Lovato. The ladies learn the entrance to the famed pre-game dance. It's a make or break moment. If a woman can't learn it quickly it might be her last night.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With two suspended vets, the team must re-block their formations for their Hall Of Fame performance. New vets step up as a new point of the triangle is named. The rookie candidates try to get their footing during this never seen before rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 23 veterans travel to Canton, Ohio to perform at Jerry Jones' induction to the Pro Football Hall of Fame. All eyes are watching as the DCC perform for the NFL elite.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp winds down the pressure skyrockets. No one wants to be sent home now. The ladies start to crack under the pressure. Another one is sent home. Will this be the final cut?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli announces the official squad and the women realize the hard-fought dream of becoming a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Full of excitement and nerves, the squad prepares for their very first football game at AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of eager hopefuls -- ranging from starry-eyed rookies to experienced NFL cheerleaders -- gather at AT&T Stadium for a shot at joining the world's most famous squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 125 remaining hopefuls must nail a choreographed routine before advancing to the final rounds, and the DCC veterans reveal their plans for the future.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A former Laker Girl who survived the Las Vegas shooting chases her dream, and the women work on their solo presentations and interviews as finals approach.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The returning veterans travel to the Bahamas to shoot the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders swimsuit calendar, and the rookies feel the pressure as training camp begins.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The first-year hopefuls get new looks on Rookie Makeover Day, DCC alumni give the candidates feedback, and Cowboys' Head Coach Jason Garrett stops by during a rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Before Kelli and Judy make roster cuts, the rookies learn the famed kickline and jump splits, get fitted for the iconic uniform and face Jay Johnson's power squad training.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winning choreographer Travis Wall tests the hopefuls' contemporary dance skills, Kelli and Judy make show group selections, and Melissa Rycroft teaches injury prevention.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A tight-knit Long Island family go to extraordinary lengths to find their missing sister.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a woman is found murdered in her bed, her husband and her son accuse each other of being the killer.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A thump heard by the children in a Carlsbad, Calif., home one summer morning is the first clue in a shocking mystery involving family secrets.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A father is accused of stealing money from his children's trust funds and murdering his ex-wife to cover up his crimes.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Detectives find a message written in blood during a murder investigation.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man convicted of murdering a woman in her upscale Austin, Texas, home tells his story for the first time.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A romantic Mediterranean cruise intended to rekindle the love between a woman and her ex-husband leads to her vanishing; the investigation reveals secret recordings, a surprising star witness and an undercover hit man.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Investigators seek answers when a prosecutor and a district attorney and his wife are murdered within a couple of months of each other.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in an empty warehouse parking lot in Miami -- just four days after her wedding.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Two young girls in Washington are snatched in broad daylight while riding their bikes; the case goes unsolved for decades, until a new detective with a local connection to the story tries to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Two decades after a woman falls to her death, police reopen the case and arrest her husband.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The murder of a young schoolteacher in Pennsylvania goes unsolved for years, but investigators discover a new tool that may finally help unlock the murderer's identity.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After a plastic surgeon and local musician is murdered in his Asheville, N.C., home, investigators uncover a trail of clues pointing to an unlikely killer; new details emerge from exclusive TV interviews with insiders close to the case.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Family Flavors
programme.desc: Three girls are left! Things are getting serious so Flav decides it's time to meet the ladies' parents.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Slaps, Smacks, Screams and Spit You Never Saw
programme.desc: A lot of crazy stuff has happened in Flav's house since the girls arrived.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Viva La Flav
programme.desc: The final two girls remain. To celebrate having made it this far, Flav takes the two girls to Puerto Vallarta for an exotic three day Mexican getaway.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: After the Lovin (Finale)
programme.desc: Flavor Flav and all 20 of the original Flavorettes are back for a reunion show like you've never seen before.

programme.title: I Love New York: Let's Do It Again
programme.desc: New York must eliminate 5 men, but it's not that easy. At a pre-elimination cocktail party, things heat up as the men drink too much, fight and even bribe others to win over New York.

programme.title: I Love New York: Flowers from Fishburne
programme.desc: Now down to 15 men, New York invites the guys to a pond where they must prove their love by swimming to her and presenting her with a gift.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Stolen Date
programme.desc: With 12 guys left, some of the boys play a prank on a few of the less popular men that keeps them up all night.

programme.title: I Love New York: Nobody Likes a Snitch
programme.desc: New York has barely wiped the morning out of her eyes when a fight breaks out between two of her boys. Although NY can be a tolerant person, violence is non-negotiable and she is faced with the tough decision to let a guy go.

programme.title: I Love New York: Blood Oath Gone Bad
programme.desc: After snitching, fighting, and spitting, and nearly getting eliminated, one man is the house enemy and anxiously waits for an opportunity to redeem himself.

programme.title: I Love New York: Nip/Suck
programme.desc: New York surprises the guys with the return of one man. Another man is unhappy as his world is suddenly turned upside down and he literally fears for his life.

programme.title: I Love New York: I Still Have Love for New York
programme.desc: New York invites the remaining six guys' exes to the house and this time, there's a special twist involved. She's bringing two of HER exes, Chance and Real, to help dig up some dirt on her guys.

programme.title: I Love New York: Mind Games
programme.desc: With 5 guys left, New York wants to find out who's the most compatible with her and who's just plain crazy, when she takes the boys for a psych test.

programme.title: I Love New York: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: With only four guys left it's time to clean house, literally. New York has invited some special guests-the guy's parents, so she gets her boys to scour and scrub her house for their arrival.

programme.title: I Love New York: Miami Thrice
programme.desc: After the last elimination, New York tells her final three men to pack their bags because they're heading to Miami!

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Haunted by memories of her recent sexual assault, Paige is desperately trying to appear normal. A girl band contest sounds like a great distraction. Terri wants to reunite PMS—including Ashley. Paige refuses and recruits Hazel instead.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby is tired of being an invisible computer geek so he decides to join a sports team. Girls love wrestlers - that includes Toby’s crush Kendra. To Toby's dismay, the few extra pounds he carries put him in the same weight class as athletic Sean.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s crush on Craig has reached huge proportions and everyone’s urging her to ask him out already! But Manny’s a romantic; she thinks the guy ought to do the asking

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Grade Nine International Day is coming up and Hazel isn’t thrilled. After all, Hazel’s Jamaican and everybody loves the islands - right? When the day arrives, Hazel’s display is a hit, but she isn’t acting like herself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie are the best of friends. But Ellie is starting to want more…Marco though can’t seem to respond in kind. He’s more and more confused about what and who he’s looking for…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When class clown JT acts up in Science class, his teacher Ms. Hatzilakos gives him a serious detention - assisting her with the guinea pigs all week. JT’s annoyed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Sean. He and Emma are back together. He’s a star on the basketball team. And he and Jimmy have buried the hatchet. Jimmy’s even invited him to a party. But the good feelings don’t last for long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Liberty can’t believe it when she doesn’t make the Girls Floor Hockey team – she’s never failed at anything. So when Coach Hatzilakos asks her to be the Team Manager, Liberty throws all her energy into managing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy are back together, but it doesn’t feel quite the same. Ash may not look the same as last year – she’s a Goth now – but Jimmy’s sure she’s still the same golden girl inside.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s mom is away for a few days and it’s just her and her step-dad, Mr. Simpson. He’s supportive of Emma’s involvement in “Food for Thought”; the student group who wants to remove genetically modified (GM) foods from the school cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being in counseling for a long time, Paige is positive she’s recovered from her date rape. In fact, she’s convinced her life is back to normal – Dean and what he did are behind her forever. She never wants to see him again, so she’s dismissive.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s exam time and everyone’s stressed – especially Craig. In a surprise visit from his father, Craig learns that his dad is very eager to have him back in his life.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Although his father is gone, Craig wants to get on with his life as normal. He insists on going back to school immediately and becomes frustrated with his friends when they behave with concern.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s on a mission this year—it’s bye bye cute and hello hot. That means midriff baring tops, low-riders and thongs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige organizes a final hurrah at the beach and even convinces her older brother, Dylan, to act as chauffeur. Spinner’s a bit put-off by Dylan’s openly gay attitude, but his presence is an eye-opener for Marco.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner just can’t deal with the fact that Marco’s gay so he tries to cut Marco out of life. But when the guys all go to see Dylan’s hockey game, Jimmy makes sure that Marco comes along.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things haven’t been going very well for Sean lately. Emma’s busy dealing with Snake’s illness and a brand new baby brother and Tracker’s busy leading the exciting life a normal 20-something.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are pretty hot between Craig and Ashley, but he’s disappointed that she keeps pulling back from going all the way.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Life’s getting more and more stressful for Ellie—her dad just left on another Peacekeeping Mission, her mom’s drinking again and she’s interning for Caitlin Ryan’s tv show. As things get more and more hectic, Ellie has no one to help her cope.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides it’s time to move on in matters of the heart when she realizes she has feelings for new kid Chris.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Adam wants to be one of the guys. But when news breaks he’s transgender, that becomes impossible. As life at Degrassi worsens, friends and family don’t understand why he doesn’t just live as a girl.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Adam wants to be one of the guys. But when news breaks he’s transgender, that becomes impossible. As life at Degrassi worsens, friends and family don’t understand why he doesn’t just live as a girl.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare is disillusioned with her parents after they decide to separate and she starts questioning her faith, including her decision to wait until after marriage for sex. When Eli rejects her, she wonders if he’s really over his dead ex-girlfriend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.
